channel.title: BCD-watch: New Baselines Report (weekly)
channel.description: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Jul 13 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 6 July 2026 through Monday, 13 July 2026🔗

2 new universal implementations

API

  1. api ➞ AnimationEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ TransitionEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 6 July 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.5 (Friday, 3 July 2026) and v8.0.6 (Friday, 10 July 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Jul 06 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 29 June 2026 through Monday, 6 July 2026🔗

38 new universal implementations

API

  1. api ➞ CookieStore ➞ set ➞ maxAge_option
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Document ➞ exitPictureInPicture
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Document ➞ pictureInPictureElement
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ Document ➞ pictureInPictureEnabled
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ GPUDevice ➞ uncapturederror_event
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInFragmentStage
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInVertexStage
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInFragmentStage
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInVertexStage
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ HTMLVideoElement ➞ enterpictureinpicture_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ HTMLVideoElement ➞ leavepictureinpicture_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ HTMLVideoElement ➞ requestPictureInPicture
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ IDBIndex ➞ getAllRecords
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ IDBObjectStore ➞ getAllRecords
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ IDBRecord
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ IDBRecord ➞ key
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ IDBRecord ➞ primaryKey
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ IDBRecord ➞ value
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ PictureInPictureEvent ➞ pictureInPictureWindow
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ PictureInPictureWindow
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ PictureInPictureWindow ➞ height
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  22. api ➞ PictureInPictureWindow ➞ resize_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ PictureInPictureWindow ➞ width
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ RTCDtlsTransport ➞ getRemoteCertificates
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  25. api ➞ RTCRtpReceiver ➞ jitterBufferTarget
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  26. api ➞ ReadableStream ➞ values
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  27. api ➞ ShadowRoot ➞ pictureInPictureElement
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ alphabetic
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ central
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ ideographic
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ mathematical
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-anchor ➞ auto
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ overflow-anchor ➞ none
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ position-anchor ➞ none
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ selectors ➞ picture-in-picture
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. css ➞ properties ➞ alignment-baseline ➞ hanging
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ builtins ➞ Error ➞ stackTraceLimit
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ jspi
    Added to Firefox,Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 29 June 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.4 (Monday, 29 June 2026) and v8.0.5 (Friday, 3 July 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Jun 29 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 22 June 2026 through Monday, 29 June 2026🔗

1 new universal implementation

API

  1. api ➞ HTMLImageElement ➞ sizes ➞ auto
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 22 June 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.4 (Friday, 19 June 2026) and v8.0.4 (Monday, 29 June 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Jun 22 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 15 June 2026 through Monday, 22 June 2026🔗

49 new universal implementations

API

  1. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_inbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_outbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_remote-inbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_remote-outbound-rtp ➞ transportId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ dtlsCipher
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ dtlsState
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ id
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ selectedCandidatePairId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ srtpCipher
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ timestamp
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ tlsVersion
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ RTCStatsReport ➞ type_transport ➞ type
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBEXTENSIONS

  1. webextensions ➞ api ➞ runtime ➞ MessageSender ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getAllFrames ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getAllFrames ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getFrame ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ getFrame ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onBeforeNavigate ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCommitted ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCommitted ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCompleted ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onCompleted ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onDOMContentLoaded ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onDOMContentLoaded ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webNavigation ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. webextensions ➞ api ➞ scripting ➞ InjectionTarget ➞ documentIds
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. webextensions ➞ api ➞ scripting ➞ executeScript ➞ InjectionResult ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  17. webextensions ➞ api ➞ tabs ➞ connect ➞ connectInfo ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  18. webextensions ➞ api ➞ tabs ➞ sendMessage ➞ options ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  19. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onAuthRequired ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  20. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onAuthRequired ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  21. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRedirect ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  22. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRedirect ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  23. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRequest ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  24. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeRequest ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  25. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  26. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onBeforeSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  27. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onCompleted ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  28. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onCompleted ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  29. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  30. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onErrorOccurred ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  31. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onHeadersReceived ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  32. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onHeadersReceived ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  33. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onResponseStarted ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  34. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onResponseStarted ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  35. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ documentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  36. webextensions ➞ api ➞ webRequest ➞ onSendHeaders ➞ details ➞ parentDocumentId
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  • Previous report: Monday, 15 June 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.3 (Friday, 12 June 2026) and v8.0.4 (Friday, 19 June 2026)

item.title: BCD New Universal Implementations Report, Mon Jun 15 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new Baseline items in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 8 June 2026 through Monday, 15 June 2026🔗

No new universal implementations to report 🙁

  • Previous report: Monday, 8 June 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v8.0.2 (Friday, 5 June 2026) and v8.0.3 (Friday, 12 June 2026)
